title: brachypeza minimipes
intro: Brachypeza minimipes is a species of plant in the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the lesser club moss due to its club-shaped inflorescence. It is native to tropical regions, particularly in the Western Ghats of India. The medicinal properties of Brachypeza minimipes include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions, and is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health.
